title: Partner Relationship Term and Condition
description: Partner relationship terms and conditions are the formal rules and obligations that govern how the bank and its partner work together, covering roles, responsibilities, performance, compliance, revenue, risk, and termination.

PartnerRelationshipTermandConditionType.description: Partner relationship term and condition types are the categories of contractual rules and obligations governing a bank-partner relationship, including operational, financial, performance, risk, compliance, confidentiality, duration, termination, and dispute resolution.
